why: CHART: oversold extreme (-0.97% into 7309 day low), 11:20 engulfing reversal candle 7314.9->7331.7, 11:25 holding 7330.7, 5-min momentum flipped +0.22%. Base held just above thin 7295 floor. GEX CONFIRM: strong positive-gamma reasserted 61M->121M (mean-reversion regime), 7345 king pika magnet strengthened to 56M just 14pts overhead pulling price up, floor held. Mean-reversion long targeting 7345 node magnet then VWAP 7361; cap winner at node.

Thesis broke: bounce failed to reach 7345 magnet, printed lower high 7336, 11:30 candle rolled over 7327.9->7319.8, price back at 7319.8 re-testing 7309 day low and hitting my stop (lose 7320). Cutting small loss (underlying -0.15%) rather than risk a break of 7309 into the air pocket. Exit fast when thesis breaks.

CHART: descending triangle at the 7300 floor (lower highs 7334->7324->7308 into flat triple-bottom 7299.9), 13:35 broke down decisively 7300.5->7294.6 = new day low, downtrend, below VWAP 7337. GEX CONFIRM: the 7295 floor NODE broke and vanished from the map — nearest support below jumped to 7225 (70pts of air pocket), near-spot gamma collapsed to +19M (weakest all day, pin nearly gone), king 7345 far above. Air-pocket short = transition out of the pin. Target 7275-7280 then 7225 magnet; cap winner. Stop = reclaim 7302-7305.

FALSE BREAK / bear trap. 13:45 candle marginal new low 7291.59 then reversed hard to 7311.6 close 7309.9, reclaiming the 7300 floor and blowing through my 7302-7305 stop. GEX invalidation: near-spot gamma snapped back 16M->86M and the 7295 floor NODE reappeared — air pocket closed, dealers defended. Thesis dead, cutting the loss (underlying -0.21%) immediately.

CHART: grind up off the bear-trap lows, 14:00 closed 7327 (higher high vs prior chop), 14:05 small pullback to 7324.9 near support = good entry (not chasing), 15-min momentum +0.18%. GEX CONFIRM (A+ confluence, best of day): near-spot gamma SURGED to +191M (max pin of the day), king 7345 ballooned to +88M (biggest node all day = strong up-magnet) just 20pts above, and floor MIGRATED UP 7295->7320 (support building 25pts higher, 5pts below spot). Whole structure lifted = pin toward 7345 king into the afternoon. Entry ~7325, target 7345 king, tight stop below 7320 floor (~7317).

Pin-UP thesis failed to confirm: price stalled dead flat at 7318 (entry-minus-7) for ~9 min, never migrated toward the 7345 king as required. Structural driver receding — near-spot gamma faded 191M->115M, the 7320 floor node I entered on vanished, momentum flat-to-down. Cutting small (-0.09%) rather than sit on the 7317 stop hoping. Exit when thesis does not confirm.
